issues.detail: The skill file focuses on happy path scenarios and does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: lazy-loaded-standalone-article-list
scenarios.rationale: Response A satisfies all rubric items, while Response B is a Svelte component and does not meet the Angular-specific requirements.

scenarios.name: functional-auth-guard
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A is an Express middleware unrelated to Angular guards.
